# llms.txt
# Machine-readable site summary for AI agents.
# Spec: https://llmstxt.org/

> Votepit — PHP/MySQL Voting Platform

## About Votepit

Votepit is an open-source (MIT) self-hosted up/down voting platform for PHP 8.2+ with
MySQL. Multi-board, passwordless via magic links, agent-ready PSR-4 architecture.
Deploy on any shared hosting — zero dependencies beyond PHP + MySQL + mod_rewrite.

## Key pages

- /: Landing page with interactive vote demo
- /docs: Technical documentation and usage guide
- /privacy: Privacy policy (cookieless by default)
- /de/: German landing page
- /de/docs: German documentation
- /de/datenschutz: German privacy policy (DSGVO)

## Repository

- https://github.com/silvio-l/votepit
